parsed_review.summary: CP00-912 is a descriptor-only RP30 embedded-HRX bridge pack (ApprovalWorkflow tail RP30.P02.M05.S05-S13 security_audit -> RuleEngine re-entry RP30.P02.M06.S01 implementation), 10 units, risk class A. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level descriptor claim is supported and all closed boundaries hold. (1) Three-layer implementation is consistent: HRX_CP912_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:338), createHrxCp912ApprovalRuleEngineBridgeDescriptor (registry.js:3432) and createHrxDomainRows (registry.js:1229) emit deep-frozen rows with every runtime/write/real-data/approval-payload/approval-decision/delegation/rule-definition/rule-execution/rule-decision flag set false. (2) Coverage matches baseline exactly: 9 security_audit + 1 implementation, phase RP30.P02=10, micro M05=9/M06=1, titles ApprovalWorkflow=9/RuleEngine=1, range RP30.P02.M05.S05-RP30.P02.M06.S01, binding chain CP911->CP912->CP913 / next subphase RP30.P02.M06.S02 / source_descriptor HrxCp911RiskApprovalWorkflowBridgeDescriptor. (3) Validators (validators.js:2597 coverage, :2636 descriptor, :2764 contract) enforce the chain, authority boundary, distribution, per-row + baseline_decisions + domain_entities deferral flags, and M05 ApprovalWorkflow / M06 RuleEngine specifics. (4) Tests (model.test.js:861/883/918) are substantive and read the real regenerated contract. (5) The regenerated contracts/hrx-people-contract.json latest_projection matches the generator (descriptor HrxCp912..., source HrxCp911..., authority_boundary claude_is_final_approval=false, validation.valid=true, no_write_attestation all false). (6) Live queue match: live_latest_pack_id CP00-911, live_next_unit_id RP30.P02.M05.S05, generated_queue_preview_pack_id CP00-912; plan entry matches. (7) No-write/no-real-data/no-runtime boundaries enforced via HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION plus per-row flags; Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false (deterministic review packet/receipt only, not product runtime); Claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, so Claude remains an independent read-only reviewer, not final approver. (8) Manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false/status in_progress is the correct pre-review state; no runtime or enterprise-trust claim is made, so the human-final-approval boundary is preserved and out of scope for this receipt (blocks_goal_closeout=false). (9) Review harness healthy: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON, prompt 2413 bytes (<25600), no full source/diff, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used, summary-only correctly prohibited (security/audit deliverables) and not used; no malformed/0-byte/tool-call-shaped/missing-field prior evidence (invalid_review_attempts empty). (10) All referenced npm validation scripts exist in package.json and hrx tests are included in npm test; command-evidence records the pre-review HRX subset at exit_code 0, verified by code inspection rather than re-execution per the read-only mandate, with the full deterministic validation ladder running post-review per the established CP00-911 precedent. (11) Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, .docx, ldip) are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0-P3 findings.
